sources.quote: By Ordinary resolution at the meeting of the members held on 22/03/2019 (DD/MM/YYYY)
NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN THAT THE EXTRA ORDINARY GENERAL MEETING OF THE MEMBERS OF NEXUS BRIGHTLEARN SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED WILL BE HELD ON 22nd DAY OF MARCH 2019 AT 1:00 P.M.

capital_before.raw_text: Authorised share capital increased from: Existing | 3,00,000.00

capital_after.raw_text: Revised capital structure: Authorised capital (in Rs.) 10,00,000.00

sources.quote: By Ordinary resolution at the meeting held on 15/08/2021 (DD/MM/YYYY)
RESOLVED FURTHER THAT an Extra-ordinary General Meeting be convened.
Authorised share capital increased from: Existing | 3,00,000.00
Revised capital structure: Authorised capital (in Rs.) 10,00,000.00
Purpose: Increase in share capital independently by company

flags.reason: Continuity break between evt_01_2019_mar and evt_02_2021_aug. One or both capital amounts are missing.

sources.quote: NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN THAT THE 5th ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING of the members will be held on 28th DAY OF JULY 2023
By Ordinary resolution at the Annual General Meeting held on 28/07/2023

Authorised share capital increased from:
| | (in Rs.) |
|---|---|
| Existing | 10,00,000.00 |

Revised capital structure:
(a) Authorised capital (in Rs.) 50,00,000.00
| Particulars | Count | Amount (Rs.) |
|---|---|---|
| Equity shares | 4,50,000 | 45,00,000.00 |
| Nominal per equity share | 10 | |
| Preference shares | 50,000 | 5,00,000.00 |
| Nominal per preference share | 10 | |
RESOLVED THAT the Authorised Share Capital be increased from Rs. 10,00,000 to Rs. 50,00,000 by creation of additional 4,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each.

flags.reason: Continuity mismatch (breakdown differs): previous event (evt_02_2021_aug) capital_after and this event's capital_before both total ₹1,000,000 but share counts or face values differ. Verify extraction accuracy.

events.particulars: Sub-division of equity shares from face value Rs. 10 to Rs. 2, resulting in 22,50,000 Equity Shares. Preference Share Capital remains unchanged.

sources.quote: By Ordinary resolution at the EGM held on 18/01/2025
NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN THAT AN EXTRA ORDINARY GENERAL MEETING will be held on 18th DAY OF JANUARY 2025 at 10:00 AM

RESOLVED THAT each Equity Share having face value of Rs. 10 each be sub-divided into 5 Equity Shares of Rs. 2 each, resulting in 22,50,000 Equity Shares. Preference Share Capital of Rs. 5,00,000 divided into 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each remains unchanged.

flags.reason: Sub-division detected: FV ₹10 → ₹2 (ratio 5:1). Total authorised capital unchanged at ₹5,000,000.

all_flags.reason: Continuity break between evt_01_2019_mar and evt_02_2021_aug. One or both capital amounts are missing.

Continuity mismatch (breakdown differs): previous event (evt_02_2021_aug) capital_after and this event's capital_before both total ₹1,000,000 but share counts or face values differ. Verify extraction accuracy.
Sub-division detected: FV ₹10 → ₹2 (ratio 5:1). Total authorised capital unchanged at ₹5,000,000.

S2.quote: NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN THAT THE EXTRA ORDINARY GENERAL MEETING OF THE MEMBERS OF NEXUS BRIGHTLEARN SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED WILL BE HELD ON 22nd DAY OF MARCH 2019 AT 1:00 P.M.
